meaning: n.[医]血栓动脉内膜切除术(亦作thromboendarteriectomy)
examples: Aim: to summarize 7 patients undergoing pulmonary thromboendarterectomy (PTE) in Peking Union hospital and Chaoyang hospital.
Thromboendarterectomy was performed under cardiopulmonary bypass and a highly organised embolus was taken out from her right main pulmonary artery.
